segments.text: Couldn't land the hit, but secured ledge advantage at 12.
segments.original_text: 当たりは拾えずだがしかし12分にライン有利を得た

segments.text: Trading neutral in the mixup right here.
segments.original_text: ここで入れ替えるニュートラル読み合い

segments.text: Applying relay and pushing in hard.

full_text: Couldn't land the hit, but secured ledge advantage at 12. Trading neutral in the mixup right here. Applying relay and pushing in hard.
